features.description: Support multiple decks; create, edit, and delete decks via modal
steps: Click '+ New Deck' and enter a name — deck appears in sidebar
Click a deck in the sidebar to make it active (highlighted)
Click 'Edit Name' to rename the active deck
Click 'Delete Deck' and confirm — deck is removed

features.description: Create, edit, and delete cards with front/back text per deck
steps: Click '+ New Card', fill Front and Back, save — card appears in list
Click 'Edit' on a card item — modal pre-fills, save updates the card
Click 'Delete' on a card item and confirm — card is removed

features.description: CSS 3D flip animation toggled by click, button, or Space key
steps: Click the card or 'Flip' button — card rotates 180° showing back face
Flip runs at 60fps; back face does not bleed through front
Navigating to next/prev card resets flip to front face

features.description: Prev / Next navigation and Shuffle for study mode
steps: Click 'Prev' / 'Next' or press ArrowLeft / ArrowRight to navigate
Card counter shows current position (e.g., 3 / 12)
Click 'Shuffle' to randomize card order for the session

features.description: Space = flip, ArrowLeft/Right = navigate, ESC = close modal
steps: Press Space to flip when no modal is open and focus is not in a text input
Press ArrowLeft / ArrowRight to navigate cards
Press ESC to close any open modal

features.description: Case-insensitive keyword search filtering cards by front or back text, debounced 300ms
steps: Type in the search box — card list and study card filter immediately
Search count shows number of matches
Clear search — full card set restores; underlying data is unchanged

features.description: Decks, cards, and last active deck persisted to LocalStorage with safe fallback
steps: Create decks and cards, reload the page — data is intact
Last active deck is restored on reload
Corrupt LocalStorage manually — app falls back to empty state without crashing

features.description: Responsive sidebar + main grid; sidebar collapses to top strip on mobile
steps: Resize to >700px — sidebar is fixed-width column on left
Resize to <=700px — sidebar becomes a horizontal scrolling strip on top
All interactions remain usable on mobile screen width

features.description: Dark mode via prefers-color-scheme CSS media query with custom properties
steps: Toggle OS/browser to dark mode — all surfaces, text, and borders switch
Focus rings and button states are visible in dark mode

features.description: Modals with focus trap, ESC to close, aria-modal, focus return to opener
steps: Open any modal — focus moves inside the modal
Tab cycles within modal; Shift+Tab reverses — focus never leaves modal
Press ESC or Cancel — modal closes and focus returns to the button that opened it

features.description: Meaningful empty state messages for: no decks, no cards, no search results
steps: Start with no decks — 'No decks yet' message in sidebar, landing empty state in main
Select a deck with no cards — 'No cards yet' state shown instead of flashcard
Search with no matches — 'No results' state shown

features.description: Export active deck as JSON; import a deck JSON file
steps: Click 'Export JSON' — downloads a .json file with deck and cards
Click 'Import JSON' and select the exported file — deck is re-created with new IDs
Importing a malformed file shows an error alert without crashing
